channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PM Shehbaz Recognises Turkiye’s Contribution to Pakistan-Afghanistan Peace During Eid Ceasefire
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif spoke on Thursday with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan regarding regional peace efforts, particularly the situation in Afghanistan. During the conversation, PM She...

item.title: Somali National Convicted for Recruiting and Radicalising Minors for Al-Shabaab
item.description: The Kahawa Law Courts in Nairobi have convicted a Somali man, Abdikarim Hassanow Hassan, also known as Ali, for radicalising minors and facilitating Al-Shabaab activities. The case was led by the Dire...

item.title: Rising oil prices and Middle East tensions drive sharp increase in Canadian gas costs
item.description: Gas prices across Canada have risen significantly in recent weeks, largely driven by geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and seasonal factors. As of mid-March 2026, the national average price for...

item.title: Brantford Bulldogs Finish Regular Season as OHL Eastern Conference Leaders
item.description: The Brantford Bulldogs have officially clinched the top spot in the Ontario Hockey League’s (OHL) Eastern Conference following the conclusion of the regular season. This achievement secures them a pri...

item.title: Philippines Maintains Lawful Maritime Activities at Bajo de Masinloc Amid Dispute with China
item.description: The Department of National Defense (DND) reaffirmed on March 20, 2026, that the Philippines continues to conduct lawful and routine maritime operations over Bajo de Masinloc. This statement comes afte...

item.title: The influence of Google Maps rankings on restaurant visibility and dining choices
item.description: This video report explores the growing influence of Google Maps on people’s dining decisions and highlights concerns about how the platform determines which restaurants users see. Journalist Josh Tous...

item.title: How a crowdsourced Canadian comparison tool helps travellers evaluate all-inclusive resort options
item.description: A personal finance columnist highlights a detailed, Canadian-made comparison tool designed to help travellers evaluate all-inclusive vacation resorts. The tool, created as a collaborative Google Sheet...

item.title: Tanzania faces slow growth in date palm farming due to limited seed supply
item.description: In Tanzania, demand for date palms dey rise fast but farmers dey face wahala getting good seedlings. Many farmers still dey plant old seed varieties wey no dey give plenty yield because certified plan...

item.title: House Panel Approves Right to Information Bill, Aiming to Strengthen Public Access to Government Data
item.description: The House committee on public information has approved the Right to Information (RTI) bill, a proposed law designed to guarantee the Filipino public greater access to government-held information. Acco...

item.title: Warren Backs Progressive Candidate Graham Platner in Maine Senate Primary Despite Past Controversy
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren announced her endorsement of Graham Platner in the competitive Democratic primary race in Maine, where the eventual nominee will challenge incumbent Republican Sen. Susan Collins...

item.title: Covid inquiry reveals NHS was pushed to the brink as services struggled to cope
item.description: A report from the UK Covid inquiry has revealed that patients suffered harm as the National Health Service (NHS) came perilously close to collapse during the Covid-19 pandemic. The third report in a s...

item.title: Rising oil prices strain African economies amid Middle East conflict
item.description: The sharp rise in global oil prices following the US and Israeli attacks on Iran has placed significant pressure on African economies. The conflict, which began on 28 February 2026, prompted Iran to c...

item.title: Trump Instructed Netanyahu to Avoid Strikes on Iranian Energy Infrastructure
item.description: In the midst of escalating tensions in the Iran-US-Israel conflict, President Donald Trump revealed that he directly instructed Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to refrain from targeting Iran...

item.title: Chalmers Plans Budget Reforms Amid Economic Uncertainty and Rising Inflation
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers is preparing the May 12 federal budget against a backdrop of global uncertainty, particularly the worsening Middle East conflict which is affecting fuel supply and driving infla...

item.title: Badenoch launches Conservative local election campaign highlighting long-term strategy and policy pledges
item.description: Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch has launched her party’s campaign for the upcoming local elections in England, asserting that the Conservatives are the only party with a credible plan to address the...

item.title: Nearly 900 Indians evacuated from Iran through Armenia and Azerbaijan amid ongoing conflict
item.description: Around 900 Indian nationals, the majority of them students from Jammu and Kashmir, have recently moved out of Iran through neighbouring Armenia and Azerbaijan due to the ongoing conflict triggered by ...

item.title: University of the Philippines tops 2026 EduRank list of 100 best PH universities
item.description: The University of the Philippines (UP) has once again taken the top position in the 2026 EduRank list of the Top 100 Philippine Universities. EduRank, a global university ranking system that evaluates...

item.title: MaXhosa Africa to showcase SIYI’KULTURE Autumn-Winter 2026 collection at MXS Kulture Festival in Johannesburg
item.description: MaXhosa Africa is set to present its highly anticipated Autumn-Winter 2026 collection, titled SIYI’KULTURE meaning “We Are Culture”, at the fourth edition of the MXS Kulture Festival on Saturday, 21 M...

item.title: Donald Trump Jokes About a United Ireland During St. Patrick’s Day Meeting Amid Rising International Tensions
item.description: During a St. Patrick’s Day visit to the White House, President Donald Trump made a controversial joke about a potential merger between Northern Ireland and the Republic of Ireland. The remark came whi...

item.title: Tanzania Explains Personal and Business Income Tax Structure
item.description: In Tanzania, personal income taxes are regulated under the Income Tax Act of 2004 with different rates and thresholds. The Pay-As-You-Earn (PAYE) system applies to salaries, wages, and allowances, wit...
